TranslationBanner.message: Citations are automatically translated from Italian. Hover to see the original.

CitationCard.goToCamera: Go to speech on Camera dei Deputati website

MessageBubble.expertsSectionDesc: These parliamentarians were identified as the most competent voices on the topic and used as priority sources to build the response.
MessageBubble.expertsTooltip: Before retrieving citations, the system identifies the most authoritative parliamentarians on the topic. Authority is calculated on 6 factors: floor speeches, legislative acts, committee membership, profession, education and institutional role.
MessageBubble.citationsTooltip: Parliamentary speeches retrieved from the database via hybrid semantic search (vector + full-text), from parliamentarians selected for authority on the topic.
MessageBubble.balanceTooltip: Percentage representation of citations used in the response between majority and opposition. A high score indicates a balanced response.
MessageBubble.hqTooltip: 3 response variants are generated at different temperatures, then an LLM judge selects the best for quality and balance.
MessageBubble.compassTooltip: 2D map of the ideological positioning of parliamentary groups on the topic, calculated by analyzing speech content along thematic axes extracted automatically.

ProgressIndicator.objectiveText: Generate a balanced analysis of the positions of all parliamentary groups, with verified citations from floor speeches.
ProgressIndicator.youreNextDesc: A slot is opening up. Your request will start in a few seconds.
ProgressIndicator.systemFullOneAhead: There is {ahead} person ahead of you.
ProgressIndicator.systemFullManyAhead: There are {ahead} people ahead of you.
ProgressIndicator.systemFullQueued: Your request is in queue. You will be processed as soon as a slot opens up.
ProgressIndicator.dontClose: Don't close the page — the request is registered and will run automatically.
ProgressIndicator.discoverWhileWaiting: Meanwhile, discover what you can do
ProgressIndicator.tourSemanticSearchDesc: Find speeches by concept, not just exact keywords.
ProgressIndicator.tourExpertsPerTopicDesc: Identifies the parliamentarians with the most authority on each subject.
ProgressIndicator.tourIdeologicalCompassDesc: Visualize the positioning of parliamentary groups on any topic.
ProgressIndicator.tourVerifiedCitationsDesc: Every statement is linked to the original floor speech.
ProgressIndicator.tourBalanceDesc: Check whether the response is balanced between the two sides.
ProgressIndicator.tourCommitteesDesc: Discover which committee is responsible for each topic addressed.

step1.label: Query analysis
step1.whyDescription: We analyze your question to identify the main topic and classify it correctly. This allows directing the search toward the most relevant committees and parliamentarians.

step2.label: Committees
step2.whyDescription: We identify the most relevant parliamentary committee for the requested topic. Committees are the heart of legislative work: this is where topics are discussed in detail.

step3.label: Authoritative sources
step3.whyDescription: Before retrieving any citation, the system identifies the most authoritative parliamentarians on the topic. Authority is calculated on 6 criteria: floor speeches, legislative acts, committee membership, profession, education and institutional role. Only the most competent voices become priority sources.

step4.label: Speeches
step4.whyDescription: We retrieve speeches from parliamentarians identified as authoritative. This ensures that citations are not random, but come from those who have demonstrated real expertise on the topic.

step5.label: Statistics
step5.whyDescription: We calculate the representation percentages of majority and opposition in the speeches found. This allows us to measure and guarantee the balance of the response.

step6.label: Ideological Compass
step6.whyDescription: We analyze the ideological positioning of parliamentary groups on the specific topic, mapping positions on axes of an ideological compass.

step7.label: Generation
step7.whyDescription: We generate the final balanced synthesis integrating all collected data: speeches, experts, statistics and ideological positioning, with citations verified from parliamentary speeches.

step8.label: Saving
step8.whyDescription: We complete the final verification of the response, validating citations and saving the result to history for future consultation.

Sidebar.ragDescription: RAG system for balanced analysis of Italian parliamentary debates.
